output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P27 wd:Q30 .
  ?winner wdt:P2522 ?edition .
  ?edition wdt:P361 wd:Q752138 .
  ?edition wdt:P585 ?year
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

SELECT ?year
WHERE {
  wd:Q752138 wdt:P136 ?edition .
  ?edition wdt:P585 ?year .
  ?edition wdt:P125 ?winner .
  ?winner wdt:P27 wd:Q30 .
  ORDER BY DESC(?year)
  LIMIT 1
